title: Set up Sanity CMS in Next.js
summary: Embed Sanity Studio in Next.js and query content with GROQ — includes schemas, image handling, and live preview setup.
declaration: I will set up Sanity CMS v3 in this Next.js project, embedding the Studio at /studio and querying content with GROQ in Server Components. You will need a free Sanity account. If you need a self-hosted CMS with its own database, consider Payload CMS instead.
